'''Meis''', a [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]], was one of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo's]] commanding officers during Solo's first year of service.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Hutt Gambit]]'' {{1st}}
